archetypes.title: Bruiser
archetypes.abilityText: Ignores precision rule. Can attack any target regardless of HP.

archetypes.title: Snitch
archetypes.abilityText: On play: reveal opponent's top 3 draw pile cards.

archetypes.title: Lookout
archetypes.abilityText: On play: swap this card with any card in your reserves.

archetypes.title: Enforcer
archetypes.abilityText: Deals double damage to cards from a rival affiliation.

archetypes.title: Ghost
archetypes.abilityText: Can attack directly from reserves without being drawn first.

archetypes.title: Arsonist
archetypes.abilityText: On attack: also deals 2 damage to opponent's top draw pile card.

archetypes.title: Shark
archetypes.abilityText: Damage +1 for each card fewer the opponent has than you.

archetypes.title: Fence
archetypes.abilityText: On sacrifice: draw 2 cards instead of healing.

archetypes.title: Medic
archetypes.abilityText: On sacrifice: heal double. Can heal from reserves.

archetypes.title: Wheelman
archetypes.abilityText: On play: swap vanguard with any card in your hand.

archetypes.title: Hustler
archetypes.abilityText: On attack: steal 1 random card from opponent's hand.

archetypes.title: Sniper
archetypes.abilityText: Can target any card in opponent's hand, not just vanguard.
